Interactive Simulations

Virtual Laboratory

Digital experimentation platform for CFD and Fluid Mechanics. Explore interactive modules and high-fidelity simulations.

CFD

Laminar & Turbulent Flows

Visualizing flow patterns through various geometries using ANSYS Fluent based digital twins.

Start Reynolds Experiment
Fluid Mechanics

Bernoulli's Theorem

Verification of Bernoulli's theorem for incompressible flow in a varying cross-section duct.

Start Experiment
Hydraulics

Pipe Friction Loss

Determination of friction factor for different types of pipes and flow regimes.

Start Experiment
Instrumentation

Venturimeter Calibration

Determination of coefficient of discharge for a Venturimeter to measure flow rate.

Start Experiment
Instrumentation

Orifice Meter Calibration

Calibration and measurement of flow using an Orifice plate installation.

Start Experiment
Fluid Dynamics

Impact of Jet

Investigation of forces produced by a liquid jet striking flat or hemispherical vanes.

Start Experiment
Turbo Machinery

Centrifugal Pump

Analysis of performance characteristics (Power, Efficiency, Head) of a Centrifugal Pump.

Start Experiment
Turbo Machinery

Pelton Wheel Turbine

Experimentation on impulse turbine performance under varying load and head conditions.

Start Experiment
Turbo Machinery

Francis Turbine

Study of reaction turbine performance and efficiency curves through simulation.

Start Experiment
Hydrostatics

Metacentric Height

Determination of metacentric height of a floating vessel for stability analysis.

Start Experiment

Prof. Faisal Shameem
